issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have less Life cards than your opponent' requires a condition checking life differential, not 'Always'

Second effect is completely incorrect. Text describes [DON!! x1] cost mechanic (activated ability requiring 1 DON to activate), not a trigger-based trash-and-play effect. The effect should activate when you pay 1 DON
'Activated' trigger is incorrect for a static conditional ability. Should be 'Trigger' or 'StartOfTurn' to represent continuous checking of life differential condition

condition.description: You have less Life cards than your opponent
